subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath spoken and caused all things to speak, testifying that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. He hath verily illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نطق و انطق کل شیء علی انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم قد انار
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
